sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46332" key="zugopoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζῠγοποι-ός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n46332.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">maker of yokes</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:130" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">130</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
